summary: Iteration 186 COMPREHENSIVE Regression + Feature Testing Complete - All 16 backend tests passed (100%), All frontend pages verified working

issues: 'Missing API Keys' modal appears on all pages - expected behavior warning about optional integrations (Heartbeat, Emailit, Cloudinary), does not block functionality

REGRESSION_P0_Bug1_complete_onboarding.description: POST /api/profit/complete-onboarding accepts new trader payload with starting_balance field

REGRESSION_P0_Bug4_admin_dashboard_membe.description: Admin Dashboard shows Total Members: 5 (uses response.total correctly)

P1_forum_tabs.description: Forum page shows Open/Solved/All tabs with Open as default (4 Open, 2 Solved, 6 total posts)

P1_suspended_isolation.description: GET /api/admin/members endpoint working, member list displayed correctly

P1_member_stats_overview.description: GET /api/admin/members/stats/overview returns active_members=5, team_leaders=1, suspended=1, in_danger=0

P2_habits_day_of_week_screenshot.description: POST /api/admin/habits with day_of_week and requires_screenshot creates correctly. Daily Habits page loaded with streak tracking

P2_fraud_warnings.description: GET /api/habits/my-warnings returns warnings array, active_warning, rejection_count structure

P2_team_system.description: GET /api/referrals/my-team returns team array with stats (total=1, active=0, in_danger=0, new_this_week=0)

P2_registration_security.description: GET /api/admin/pending-registrations returns pending list with count=0

P2_cleanup_overview.description: GET /api/admin/cleanup-overview returns all sections: pending_proofs=3, fraud_warnings=0, in_danger=0, auto_suspended=0, pending_registrations=0

P2_forum_merge.description: POST /api/forum/posts/merge endpoint exists and validates inputs (returns 400/404 for invalid IDs)

frontend_admin_dashboard.description: Admin Dashboard loads with cleanup alert banner ('Action Required - 3 Pending Proofs'), Admin Cleanup quick action card, Total Members=5

frontend_admin_cleanup_page.description: AdminCleanupPage loads with 5 stat cards: Pending Proofs(3), Fraud Warnings(0), In Danger(0), Auto-Suspended(0), Pending Signups(0)

frontend_my_team_page.description: TeamPage loads with 4 stat cards: Total Members(1), Active This Week(0), In Danger(0), New This Week(0). Shows team member Ryan Salvador TEST

frontend_habit_tracker.description: Daily Habits page loads with Current Streak(1), Best Streak(2), Total Days(4), Platform Tasks, Growth Roadmap

frontend_admin_members.description: Member Management page shows 4 stat cards: Total Active Members(5), Team Leaders(1), Suspended Users(1), In Danger(0)

frontend_referral_tree_visual.description: Referral Tree Visual view has off-white readable background with D3 tree visualization showing Community -> J J hierarchy

frontend_sidebar_navigation.description: Sidebar shows all required links: My Team, Admin Dashboard, Admin Cleanup (via Admin Dashboard), all admin links working

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 186 FINAL comprehensive test passed.
